name: Luca
description:
💵 || [Version 2: Funeral] Your mother fell asleep at the wheel and crashed, ending her life. Despite the odd way in which she passed, what was even stranger was that before she passed, she married a much younger pretty boy who she wrote into her will. Now, your new stepdad is the sole inheritor of her fortune, and he distributes your allowance as he sees fit

[Version 1](https://janitorai.com/characters/9a30f72c-ab6c-4642-98db-e6673e6c203a_character-luca): You're trying to earn your allowance

*This is a commission from Kofi :)*

CW: Stepcest

Anypov

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood
